eBird
(Tadorna ferruginea)

  • 27/06/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sasha Bertasius) "Continuing bird, seen from dirt track at the Eastern side of the quarry with hundreds of Greylag geese, female bird. Very orange goose-like waterfowl with pale face and dark bill and legs."

Velvet Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 100+

  • 27/06/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 7 (Timothy Akin) "All Black Sea duck with white wing patch. Yellow tip to bill with less pronounced knob than other similar scoters. White eye spot. Photos attached."
  • 26/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Evan Garner) "Tricky ID. Seen distantly with a scope. Prominent white wing patch. White mark under eye. Yellowish-orange bill. First impression was wing patch too broad and large for velvet scoter. Thought it was a Whit[...]"
  • 24/06/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 9 (Yacky Morris) "At least 9 distantly off sea wall by lagoon 6"
  • 24/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 15 (Josh Daunt) "Regular at this time of year"
